title: Strata — an optimizing compiler to WebAssembly
description: A from-scratch optimizing compiler that turns a small C-like language into real WebAssembly bytecode in your browser: SSA, SCCP/GVN/LICM/DCE/inlining, if-conversion to branchless select, and a relooper backend — with do-while/switch, a real string standard library, first-class str[] arrays (split/join), a step debugger, and a differential test suite proving the wasm matches a reference interpreter at every opt level.
